readiness_levels.ready: Core path has local execution evidence and produces usable artifacts.
readiness_levels.partial: At least one main step is locally validated, but an important downstream step is blocked, missing, or contract-fragile.
readiness_levels.declared_only: Clearly represented in the reviewed registry, but not locally executed in this validation pass.
readiness_levels.blocked: The intended chain is currently non-usable because a critical stage emits no artifacts or fails contract handoff.

skills.title: Slide Preprocess Gate
skills.purpose: Filter low-quality slides, estimate spacing when needed, and restrict downstream analysis to tissue foreground.
local_evidence: 1-foreground-segmentation verified in demo mode with a real TIF mask
breakpoints: 40 and 57 are not locally executed in this pass
planner drift can skip or misroute this gate

skills.title: Classification Screening
skills.purpose: Run disease-specific or pan-cancer slide-level screening and emit heatmaps, suspicious-region masks, and reports.
breakpoints: classification-to-overlay mask contract mismatch: png versus tif/tiff
planner drift across disease families

skills.title: Region Segmentation
skills.purpose: Produce WSI-aligned tissue or lesion masks for downstream interpretation or post-processing.
local_evidence: foreground segmentation path is locally real
mask-oriented segmentation branch is structurally supported
breakpoints: overlay returns completed_no_output even when preflight is ready

skills.title: Multi-Resolution Tissue Prior
skills.purpose: Generate a stronger tissue prior mask when single-scale support masks may be too weak.
breakpoints: no local manifest evidence for TUZI in this pass
overlay tail inherits the 59 gap if required

skills.title: Nucleus Pathomics
skills.purpose: Generate nucleus instances and pass them into nucleus-aware pathomics feature extraction.
local_evidence: legacy 4-nucleus-segmentation-hovernet-pannuke verified in demo mode as adjacent proof
breakpoints: reviewed preferred nucleus tools 50 and 53 were not locally executed in this pass
pathomics stage 77 has no local manifest proof in this pass

skills.title: IHC Quantification
skills.purpose: Detect and quantify positive and negative IHC cells.
breakpoints: no local execution trace in this pass
planner currently drifts away from IHC tasks

skills.title: Prompt Segmentation
skills.purpose: Use prompt-driven segmentation when the task is concept-based rather than disease-specific.
breakpoints: no local execution proof in this pass
overlay inherits the 59 zero-output problem if requested

skills.title: Virtual Modality
skills.purpose: Generate virtual modality imagery rather than masks or classifications.
breakpoints: no local manifest evidence in this pass
outputs are generated images, not standard mask-chain artifacts

skills.title: Specialized TLS
skills.purpose: Segment tertiary lymphoid structures and related germinal-center patterns.
breakpoints: no local execution proof in this pass
overlay still depends on the 59 visualization gap if requested

skills.title: Normalization Bridge
skills.purpose: Normalize stain appearance before a downstream model when normalization is required.
local_evidence: 52-Global-Macenko executed locally but produced no output files
breakpoints: empty upstream output blocks the downstream chain immediately

skills.title: Overlay Review
skills.purpose: Generate a human-readable overlay from an existing slide and TIF/TIFF mask.
input_contract: input_mask with tif or tiff extension
local_evidence: overlay preflight can be ready for foreground and nucleus masks
breakpoints: execution returns completed_no_output
detection masks also violate the required tif/tiff extension

scheduling_policy: determine task family with deterministic rules before planner ranking
bind to a named skill before choosing individual tools
reject any chain that requires skill_overlay_review or skill_normalization_bridge as mandatory final steps
treat declared_only skills as review-mode suggestions until manifest proof is added
